title: スプリングSの後に・スピード勝ち

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I won! I ran those 1,800 meters in an
instant!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That's right, I'm amazing! I'm amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I hope you know now that no matter the race, my
speed can't be beat!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So Trainer, about the Satsuki Sho—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, yes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm amazing! So about that Satsuki
Sho—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt about that! Speed makes a true
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll put the speed that scored my win at the Spring
Stakes to use at the Satsuki Sho—
choice_data_list: Let's keep working on that speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?!
choice_data_list: So that you'll win any race, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Win no matter what?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No matter what means 100%. That's as certain as
me being class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That'd mean... as long as I compete, I'll always
win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure I could reach that kinda level just by
improving my speed?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then I will improve my speed even more! To be a
model class representative, I must win every time!
choice_data_list: Then next up is the Aoi Stakes!
Then next up is the Aoi Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll be dropping a grade, but if there's a race
she can definitely win, it's a 1,200-meter race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, the Aoi Stakes?!
choice_data_list:
The best way to improve your speed is to
compete in many races, no matter the grade!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now that you mention it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! I will improve my speed by entering this
race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we decide her next race shall be
the Aoi Stakes!
